server/src/image_tool/gif/decode.py :: _read_color_table
def _read_color_table(reader: _Reader, packed: int) -> list[tuple[int, int, int]]:
    size = _color_table_size(packed)
    raw = reader.read(size * 3)
    table: list[tuple[int, int, int]] = []
    for index in range(size):
        offset = index * 3
        table.append((raw[offset], raw[offset + 1], raw[offset + 2]))
    return table

server/src/image_tool/gif/decode.py :: decode_gif
def decode_gif(data: bytes) -> Raster:
    """Decode a GIF image into an RGB raster.

    The container blocks are validated natively; pixel/LZW decompression uses
    Pillow so GIFs produced by both this tool and third-party encoders decode
    reliably.
    """
    _validate_gif_structure(data)
    return _raster_from_pillow(data)
